tools.name: dag.deleteDag
tools.description:
Deletes all metadata related to the DAG, including finished DAG Runs and Tasks.
Logs are not deleted. This action cannot be undone.

*New in version 2.2.0*

tools.name: dag.getDag
tools.description:
Presents only information available in database (DAGModel).
If you need detailed information, consider using GET /dags/{dag_id}/details.

tools.name: dag.getDagDetails
tools.description: The response contains many DAG attributes, so the response can be large. If possible, consider using GET /dags/{dag_id}.

tools.name: dag.getDags
tools.description:
List DAGs in the database.
`dag_id_pattern` can be set to match dags of a specific pattern

tools.name: dag.getDagSource
tools.description: Get a source code using file token.

tools.name: dag.getTask
tools.description: Get simplified representation of a task

tools.name: dag.getTasks
tools.description: Get tasks for DAG

tools.name: dag.patchDag
tools.description: Update a DAG

tools.name: dag.patchDags
tools.description:
Update DAGs of a given dag_id_pattern using UpdateMask.
This endpoint allows specifying `~` as the dag_id_pattern to update all DAGs.
*New in version 2.3.0*

tools.name: dag.postClearTaskInstances
tools.description: Clears a set of task instances associated with the DAG for a specified date range.

tools.name: dag.postSetTaskInstancesState
tools.description: Updates the state for multiple task instances simultaneously.

tools.name: dagRun.getDagRunsBatch
tools.description: This endpoint is a POST to allow filtering across a large number of DAG IDs, where as a GET it would run in to maximum HTTP request URL length limit.

tools.name: xCom.getXcomEntries
tools.description: This endpoint allows specifying `~` as the dag_id, dag_run_id, task_id to retrieve XCOM entries for for all DAGs, DAG runs and task instances. XCom values won't be returned as they can be large. Use this endpoint to get a list of XCom entries and then fetch individual entry to get value.
